# whatischapter7.org

> Plain-English guide to Chapter 7 bankruptcy -- liquidation, eligibility, and the discharge process.

whatischapter7.org is a free, open-source educational resource about Chapter 7 bankruptcy. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://whatischapter7.org/: What is Chapter 7 bankruptcy -- eligibility, process, and discharge

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
